title: 日本ダービーにむけて

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
To explain why I entrusted my dream to Chiyo, I'd
have to rewind way back in time.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
There's a period of my racing career I can't
remember clearly—like there's a blurry smudge
over the Classics.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
I remember everything until January of that year.
I had finally entered the racing world I'd loved
since I was little.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
I had rivals to race against, and I even managed
to win the Best Junior Umamusume award. Every
day was a blast.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
It was like a dream, being able to run every day. I
was so excited to race with more and more
people.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
But then, one after another, the people I wanted
to race with started turning me down, until one
day...

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text:
Sorry. Whenever I run with you, it feels like my
own future gets dimmer...

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
She hung her head and told me about her dream.
She wanted to win a graded race and make her
mother proud.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: She swore she'd do anything to make that dream come true... and then she asked me what dream I was running for.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: ...I didn't understand how she felt at all.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
I didn't have a dream. I just liked to race. I simply
wanted to compete with everyone and run like
the wind.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
I'd heard what the people in the crowd would say.
That I could be the Derby champion, or that I
might even win a Grand Prix race.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
But what then? I couldn't think of anything I'd
gain from continuing down that track. I'd just
keep losing the precious things I'd once had.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
And that was when I heard the sound of
something breaking inside of me.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
I don't have a lot of memories after that. I can't
even remember why I decided to abandon the
Classic Triple Crown tour.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
But time went on, I gained new friends, and I
started enjoying life again.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Except... whenever someone brought up the
Derby, I felt that fuzziness in my memory get just
a bit bigger.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Regret dug deeper into my heart. What if I had gone on to the Derby? What would it've been like, running there?

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
By the time I realized it, winning the Derby had
become something of an unfulfilled dream for me.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: And then...

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: I met someone who said she wanted to be like me.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Her eyes didn't just sparkle with admiration—they
glowed with determination. The second I met her
gaze, I felt something like fate.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: I wanted her to become like me too.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: ...Chiyo. Go get the Derby in my stead.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Oh, it looks like your dear admirer will be running
here today.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, isn't she the cutest? ♪ You can spot her
adorableness even from a million miles away!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Hehe. Chiyo... Carry on my spirit with all you've
got... and have fun out there.

text_block_list.name: Mr. C.B.
text_block_list.text: Are you certain you want to give her everything?

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Yes... I've already given her my dream and
everything I am.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Oh! Maruzen.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As I watch Sakura Chiyono O enter the paddock,
her expression suddenly changes into one of
shock, but she quickly composes herself.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
I'm going to win the Derby today. For your sake,
too.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: All three of us have made it.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Yes. I managed to recover in time. Ready to face
you both in this singular moment.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
I won't be able to run forever. But that is the very
reason why I run today.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
I've been preparing for so long, all to make this
moment count... Here and now.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Here and now...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
I feel the same. I'm so glad this is the Derby I get
to race in.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
My rivalry with you two is what pushed me to
persevere and keep honing myself.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
I don't want to lose to you two, and I
wholeheartedly want to become stronger...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
So I'm going to prove that I've surpassed you
both, and that my desire to win is stronger than
anyone else's.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
I'll show you just how strong the dream Maruzen
shared with me is.
